finding_results.notes: The opening now keeps the Monday-afternoon anchor and recasts Tommy's count as two nights and not yet three full days since Martin's death.
Cliff's debt pitch was rebuilt with fresh wording and rhythm, plus a concrete business-pressure detail, while preserving his smooth sales cadence.
The post-flashback return now opens on the new operational complication that the photos persist on Cliff's phone and cloud backup, then exits after Tommy sets the clean-break condition.
Removed the repeated clothing and hair inventory. Cliff is now entered through grooming, posture, and loafers instead of re-listing the chapter-1 tags.
Converted the chapter's parenthetical and expository em-dash habit into periods and commas across the major confrontation beats. Post-revision prose-line em-dash density is 0%.
Varied sentence openings across scene transitions and interior beats. A sentence-split check puts He-openers at 6.52%, under the packet threshold.
Reduced vague placeholder usage to a single colloquial instance: 'talk to you about something.'

summary: Rebuilt the opening timeline and Cliff's first proposition, compressed the post-flashback return so the phone-and-cloud complication lands immediately, and cleared the chapter-level recurrence flags without changing the chapter's required end state: Tommy is under direct external leverage and now thinks in physical solutions.
